MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Dipak Patel is present. Represented by
Plaintiff is in pro per.
Defendant, Benson Fergenson, is present.
Attorneys, James Penrod and Anne Lowinger, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-01-2010 is vacated.
